title: Ordinary Differential Equations and Initial Values · Model Repair Bay
summary: Build, test, and communicate a model involving population and mechanical dynamics. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a reproducible differential equations computational study and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Formulate first order odes in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Derive second order odes in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Compute systems odes in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper
